evidence.text: tools in Microsoft Copilot Studio and connectivity to other analytics platforms enabled us to set up an effective feedback loop,” says Pettit. Interoperability with Dataverse delivers conversational logs and feedback from customers. Adobe Analytics provides custom business metrics, and Application Insights in Azure Monitor provides near real-time technical monitoring of the platform. Copilot Studio also made it easy to take this feedback and refine the agent.
